title: Flux Switching experiment - garron transformer
description: This is from an expired patent - 3368141 by C Subieta Garron. It is a transformer in combination with a permanent magnet. Garron claims an improvemnt in out put by switching the flux through alternating coil. The little model i made seems to do exactly that - so probably worth a little more investigation than the simple job I did. For anybody interested i have just set up a website - it's new - so not so good - but i'm getting there - the address is https://sites.google.com/site/aferlab/
